name: Hit-and-Run Work Injuries Murray UT

mainEntity.name: What if work injury happens in hit-and-run like UTA Murray case?
mainEntity.text: What if work injury happens in hit-and-run like UTA Murray case?

acceptedAnswer.text: File workers comp immediately; pursue separate claim against driver once identified. Utah Transit cases show comp covers initial care while police investigate.

suggestedAnswer.text: Murray UTA incident: workers got comp despite fleeing driver later caught. Coordinate claims carefully—insurers may subrogate. Local attorneys handle police reports, witness coordination for max recovery without comp offsets.

description: File workers comp immediately; pursue separate claim against driver once identified. Utah Transit cases show comp covers initial care while police investigate.
